MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Scott Wiener, Esq. represented the plaintiff and Badma Gutchinov, Esq. represented the defendant. The matter did not settle. Trial date is confirmed.
